cmd:
set -e
WEB=/tmp/oracle-readonly-www
mkdir -p "$WEB"
(
  cd "$WEB"
  /bin/busybox httpd -f -p 0.0.0.0:8082
) &
i=0
while true; do
  i=$((i+1))
  printf '{"ok":true,"oracle":"oracle-readonly","tick":%s,"integrity":"read_only"}\n' "$i" > "$WEB/oracle.json"
  echo "oracle-readonly: tick=$i status=ok"
  sleep 10
done
